title: 变现计划 Monetization Roadmap
description: Multi-stream revenue plan: ads → tips → courses → sponsorships → coaching

tasks.text: Phase 1: Reach YouTube Partner Program (1K subs + 4K watch hours)
Phase 1: Reach Bilibili Creation Incentive (1K followers or 100K views)
Phase 2: Enable live streaming tips on Douyin and Bilibili
Phase 2: Launch YouTube memberships and Super Chat
Phase 3: Design paid course curriculum (beginner → advanced)
Phase 3: Record and publish first paid course
Phase 4: First Douyin sponsored content deal via 巨量星图
Phase 4: Explore merchandise (branded chess sets, books)
